## Privacy Checklist
- [ ] No user data is sent to any external server or API
- [ ] All processing happens in the browser
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies that phone home

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tests written for new logic
- [ ] Follows the tool folder contract (if adding a tool)
- [ ] Tool registered in `tools.registry.ts` (if adding a tool)
- [ ] `README.md` added/updated for the tool
- [ ] No test data files (CSV, JSON, etc.) committed
